summary: Fixed final-review blocking issue 2 by wiring NiceGUI pages to live cursor updates through an in-place timer-backed live region, preserving selected round context and using idempotent merge state for timeline and inbox updates without full page reload.
tasks_completed: Added NiceGUI per-client live state initialized from the existing cursor-based live update contract.
Mounted overview, rounds, inbox, runtime, troubleshooting, and selected round detail inside an in-place NiceGUI live region refreshed by ui.timer.
Preserved selected round and selected troubleshooting source context during refreshes.
Applied existing idempotent merge behavior to prevent duplicate visible timeline and inbox entries during replay, reconnect, and fallback polling.
Added frontend markers and tests for timer wiring, in-place updates, selected-round preservation, stale/fallback/failed feedback, and duplicate suppression.
Fixed /api/live Request annotation resolution so the live JSON endpoint responds instead of treating request as a required query parameter.
tests_run: uv run python -m py_compile scripts/web_app_hub.py scripts/test-web-app-hub.py
